name: Integration - Policy Cache Hit Short-Circuits Retrieval
description: Checks that when a query is already cached, the retrieval and embedding services are not called and the cached result is used.
input: POST /api/ask with a user_input that has been previously cached
output: AgentResponseModel with response generated using cached policy content
success_criteria: EmbeddingService.embed_text and RetrievalService.retrieve_policy_content are NOT called
